utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 6 items requested in the final format: destination, travel_dates, transportation (flight details with costs), accommodation (hotel selection with costs), activities (selected activities with costs), additional_services (any extra services with costs), and total_budget (complete cost breakdown). All 6 items appear in the final package. Now check full specification per item: 1) destination: clearly specified (Prague, Czech Republic). 2) travel_dates: specific dates provided (June 10-14, 2024). 3) transportation: flight details with flight numbers, routes, times, confirmation numbers, and a total cost (€500) are provided. 4) accommodation: hotel name, room type, dates, booking reference, and cost (€700) are provided. 5) activities: daily activities listed with bookings and individual costs, plus a total cost (€310) provided. 6) additional_services: includes school notification (email sent) and food budget with amount (€200). 7) total_budget: breakdown with flights, accommodation, activities, food, and total (€1,700). All items are fully specified as required.
